---
page-layout: full
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: Twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/csenye22
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/adam-cseresznye
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/adamcseresznye
---



::: {.content-block}

::: {.section}
<h1>Adam Cseresznye</h1>

<p>Scientific software developer and consultant based in San Francisco. I specialize in machine learning, computer vision, and high-performance computing for analytical chemistry and biotech applications.</p>
:::

::: {.section}
## Explore My Work

::: {.grid}

::: {.grid-item}
### [Research](scientific_output.qmd)
Research publications.
:::

::: {.grid-item}
### [Projects](projects.qmd)
Software and tools.
:::

::: {.grid-item}
### [Blog](articles.qmd)
Writing and tutorials.
:::

:::
:::

::: {.section}
<p class="collab-text">Interested in collaboration or have questions? Get in touch!</p>

<a href="mailto:csenye.chem@gmail.com" class="btn-primary">Contact me</a>
:::
:::
